name: Wolves in the Chetwood
rewards: wolf-pelts; the east road made quiet
flavorIntro: Yellow eyes ring the firelight. The pack has trailed the band since dusk, and hunger has made them bold.
designNote: Onramp rung 2 (Design B, swarm). ~20-min grind through a wolf-pack. Asks TWO questions: sustain (drain) AND whether the Warden can hold the line so the Keeper survives the wolf-lunges (spikes). Needs a better meal than the Neekerbreekers: ~5 HP/s squeaks by ragged (Keeper falls ~13%), ~7 clean. Under ~5 the Warden is overwhelmed and the healer drops (Keeper-fell 100%). physMit stays 0 — armor is a LATER rung's question.
